name: Boston Brown Bread (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, corn meal, rye flour, baking soda, and salt) into a large mixing bowl.
2. In a separate container, mix together the buttermilk, dark molasses, and raisins.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
4. Divide the batter evenly between two 10 x 6 x 1-3/4 inch wax paper-lined baking dishes.
5. Cover each dish with plastic wrap.
6. Microwave one loaf at a time on medium (50%) power for 22-24 minutes.
7. Turn the baking dish halfway through cooking by rotating it a half turn.
8. Remove the plastic wrap and let the bread cool on a solid surface for about 10 minutes before removing from the dishes.
Makes 2 loaves
